title: (Bearish Signal) VUZI, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on March 22, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that VUZI's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 34 similar cases where VUZI's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 30 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 88%. Current price $26.70 is above $11.76 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/18/21 - 03/22/21, the price experienced a +74% Uptrend. During the week of 03/15/21 - 03/22/21, the stock enjoyed a +24% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/aenyif43qto61.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=8e0f01843117e294303d29824e78dd2806b4c993

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for VUZI moved out of overbought territory on March 22, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 34 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. In 30 of the 34 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 88%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where VUZI declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 81%.

VUZI broke above its upper Bollinger Band on March 19, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10111456-vuzix-vuzi-27-63-rsi-indicator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-march-22-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
